description_long: This bungalow features a pitched, shingle-clad roof with multiple gables and a mix of stone and light-colored siding on the exterior walls. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a paved driveway leading to a covered carport at the front. There are landscaped garden beds with shrubs and small trees, as well as paved walkways and patios surrounding the house. Large windows and glass doors are distributed across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure includes a prominent front porch with a roof overhang, supported by columns, and a rear patio area for outdoor living. Evergreen trees are planted at the corners of the lot, enhancing the residential and suburban character of the home.
description: A modern bungalow with a pitched shingle roof, stone and light siding, fenced yard, covered carport, and landscaped gardens. Features large windows, a front porch, and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport, front porch, and landscaped garden beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the roof, rear patio, and evergreen trees at the property corners.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, additional windows, and the fenced backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite front angle showing the garage, front porch, and more of the side garden and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
